message:
fix(export): remove dead code and fix goroutine leak in wizard stdin handling

- Remove unused nopCloser struct (dead code)
- Fix timeout case to return error instead of silently continuing

The previous implementation had a race condition: on timeout, the
goroutine continued reading stdin while the wizard forms also tried
to read, causing potential data corruption. Now we error out safely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
